The exit is blocked by rubble...
Whoa, what are you guys doing here?: Whoa, what are you guys doing here?
You all don't know the suffering the peo: You all don't know the suffering the people of Alamissa went through!
This is supposed to be our place of soli: This is supposed to be our place of solitude!
What's wrong with us being here anyway?: What's wrong with us being here anyway? Most of us had family here!
Whaaat? Ryland? Hanging out with these c: Whaaat? Ryland? Hanging out with these creeps? They ruining your day?
All I wanted was a full night of rest.
This seems to be a diary of some sort... It's titled "Karen's Diary."
KAREN: Celine's been out again. She's go: KAREN: Celine's been out again. She's gone more and more often now.
After that fight she had on the mountain: After that fight she had on the mountain, she hasn't been doing well.
But the determination on her face is obj: But the determination on her face is objectively strong."
KAREN: My parents have been acting weird: KAREN: My parents have been acting weird around me lately. As if they have to tell me something but are reluctant.
Alexandra, Damien, Eve, and Adam have al: Alexandra, Damien, Eve, and Adam have all been out training a lot lately too.
They're my best friends, but they won't: They're my best friends, but they won't tell me why they're training...
Something is similar amongst all of them: Something is similar amongst all of them, though...
Celine has talked to each one individual: Celine has talked to each one individually at some point.
\"KAREN: Celine finally spoke to me toda: "KAREN: Celine finally spoke to me today. I finally understand everything.
I can't write down why, or what she want: I can't write down why, or what she wants, but all I have to say is that I now must train as well.
If I don't... Everything may fall to pie: If I don't... Everything may fall to pieces, and I can't allow that."
\"KAREN: It's been a year since my last: "KAREN: It's been a year since my last logged entry. I write in complete silence.
Alamissa has been destroyed. My training: Alamissa has been destroyed. My training was for naught.
We've all gone our separate ways-- Adam,: We've all gone our separate ways-- Adam, Ryland, Alexandra, Damien.
I couldn't accept how weak I was... How: I couldn't accept how weak I was... How weak my Pokémon were...
That's why I did the forbidden and went: That's why I did the forbidden and went to Castle Zygara.
I attempted to make my own Crest, but I: I attempted to make my own Crest, but I was an amateur and failed.
As a result... I can feel my mind warpin: As a result... I can feel my mind warping. Shifting, cutting, separating...
I'm writing this so that I don't forget. I can't forget.
Even though she's gone, we have to keep: Even though she's gone, we have to keep going. Otherwise this world will be lost forever."
